title: Suspected phishing campaign targeting executive team accounts
description: Several executives have received an email claiming to be from the CEO requesting them to sign a confidential document via a suspicious external link. The sender address is ceo@corporate-mail-update.com, which is fake. I am raising an alert.
triage_reason_summary: Phishing campaign targeting VIP accounts represents a major security incident, mapping directly to IT003 cyber security.
triage_recommended_next_action: Block the sender domain on the email gateway, delete the email from all user mailboxes, and issue an alert to the staff.

title: Active Directory account locked after multiple failed logins
description: My corporate Active Directory account is locked. I got locked out after mistyping my password three times this morning. I cannot log in to my laptop, Outlook, or Slack. I need my account unlocked.
triage_reason_summary: AD account lockouts preventing work require identity administration, placing this under IT003 account support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify employee identity, unlock the AD account, and prompt the user to trigger a self-service password reset if needed.

title: MFA reset request for Okta after changing physical phone
description: I got a new iPhone yesterday and I cannot set up Okta Verify because my old device is registered. I am locked out of all corporate apps because MFA is prompt-blocked. Please reset my Okta MFA token.
triage_reason_summary: Okta MFA token resets and device reregistration requires security admin action under IT003.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify user identity via secondary channel (e.g., manager confirmation), reset the Okta MFA status, and monitor enrollment.

title: Malware alert triggered on engineering sandbox test server
description: Our monitoring console shows a high-severity malware detection alert on our sandbox server (IP 10.190.22.45). It seems a test script downloaded an unauthorized binary that triggered the endpoint detection signature.
triage_reason_summary: Endpoint protection alerts and malware investigations are managed by IT003 security operations.
triage_recommended_next_action: Isolate the sandbox server from the network segment, collect file hashes, perform forensic scan, and clean the threat.

title: Provisioning system access permissions for incoming backend engineer
description: We have a new backend engineer joining the team next Monday. I need to request creation of their Active Directory account, provisioning of access to GitHub, AWS developer role, and corporate Slack channels.
triage_reason_summary: New hire account creation and role-based access control (RBAC) setup is routed to IT003.
triage_recommended_next_action: Create the AD account, configure Okta dashboard tiles, invite the user to GitHub organization, and grant AWS roles.

title: Revoking access credentials for offboarded contractor immediately
description: A contractor was terminated today and we need to immediately revoke all their corporate access permissions. Please lock their AD account, terminate Okta sessions, and revoke access to GitHub and AWS.
triage_reason_summary: Emergency credential and access revocation for offboarded employees falls under IT003 account security.
triage_recommended_next_action: Disable the AD account, invalidate all active sessions in Okta, disable the user in Google Workspace, and remove from GitHub.

title: Requesting AWS administrative console privilege elevation
description: I need temporary administrative access to the AWS production console to apply a database schema update for the release. My manager has approved this elevation for a 4-hour window starting at 8 PM.
triage_reason_summary: Privileged access management and IAM modifications are handled by IT003 security.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check the manager approval log, configure a temporary IAM policy with a 4-hour automatic expiration, and audit access.

title: Requesting access to shared company mailbox for finance support team
description: Our finance team needs access to the shared mailbox finance-inquiries@company.com to monitor invoicing questions. There are 3 staff members who need delegation permissions added in Exchange Online.
triage_reason_summary: Exchange shared mailbox delegation and delegation security falls under IT003 user accounts.
triage_recommended_next_action: Add the 3 requested users to the Outlook shared mailbox access group in Exchange Admin Center.

title: API token rotation verification for third-party shipping gateway
description: Our shipping integration API token is scheduled for rotation next Tuesday. I need security to coordinate the key rotation process, generate a new client secret, and verify the hashing algorithm complies with policy.
triage_reason_summary: API secret rotation and cryptographic checks are managed by IT003 security operations.
triage_recommended_next_action: Generate the new API key, configure it in the secret vault, and audit key access logs during transition.

title: IP allowlisting request for client staging database access
description: We need to allow connections to our staging database from the IP address of our client's office (203.113.12.4). We need to update the network security group rules on AWS to allow this ingress.
triage_reason_summary: Security group modifications and ingress control policies are handled by IT003 security admin.
triage_recommended_next_action: Add the client's IP address to the AWS SG staging rule for database access on port 5432 and verify security approval.

title: Requesting VPN connection geobypass exception for business trip
description: I am traveling to Singapore on a business trip next week. Our zero-trust network policies normally block logins from outside our home country. I request a temporary location exception in Okta for 5 days.
triage_reason_summary: Geographic access rules and VPN travel exceptions are managed under IT003 access controls.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify travel approval, add a temporary geo-blocking policy exception in Okta for the user's account, and set an expiration date.

title: Encrypted corporate USB drive policy exception request
description: I need to copy offline software installers to our air-gapped test system. Standard USB ports are blocked by our endpoint agent. I request a policy exception to authorize one encrypted corporate USB drive.
triage_reason_summary: DLP USB exceptions and hardware storage authorization falls under IT003 security policy enforcement.
triage_recommended_next_action: Review the justification, assign a hardware-encrypted USB drive, and whitelist the device ID in the MDM security policy.

title: Registering personal smartphone in corporate BYOD MDM program
description: I want to access my corporate emails and calendar on my personal iPhone. I need security to send me the enrollment link for the Mobile Device Management (MDM) profile so my device is compliant.
triage_reason_summary: BYOD MDM profiles and device security posture checks are handled by IT003 security team.
triage_recommended_next_action: Send the MDM enrollment invitation link to the user and monitor device compliance status in Microsoft Intune.

title: Security compliance review for third-party feedback software
description: Our team wants to purchase a feedback collection SaaS tool called SurveyApp. I need security to perform a risk assessment on their data encryption at rest, GDPR compliance, and fill out our vendor checklist.
triage_reason_summary: Vendor security assessments and SaaS security compliance reviews are managed by IT003 GRC.
triage_recommended_next_action: Obtain the SaaS vendor SOC2 report, review their data privacy policy, and complete the security risk assessment form.

title: Resetting security answers for corporate portal account
description: I forgot my security recovery answers for the internal HR portal and cannot change my password. I need someone to reset my security questions so I can choose new ones upon my next login.
triage_reason_summary: Security answers reset and portal authentication recovery is managed by IT003 identity support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify identity over a voice call, clear the security question hashes in the portal user DB, and notify the employee.

title: PCI-DSS database audit log export request for annual certification
description: For our upcoming PCI-DSS audit, we need to export the administrative access logs for the main payment database from March 1st to May 31st. The auditor requires these logs in a tamper-evident CSV format.
triage_reason_summary: Compliance audits and database log extraction is a GRC task under IT003.
triage_recommended_next_action: Extract the administrative database audit logs from AWS CloudWatch, verify cryptographic signatures, and export them safely.

title: Investigating unauthorized logins from outside office hours
description: Our audit logs detected two successful logins to our internal billing system using my account credentials last night at 3 AM. I was asleep at that time. I suspect my credentials may have been compromised.
triage_reason_summary: Potential account compromise and unauthorized access represents a critical security incident under IT003.
triage_recommended_next_action: Immediately disable the compromised user account, terminate all active web sessions, and check login IP addresses in audit logs.

title: Renewing code signing certificate for desktop application release
description: The code signing certificate used for signing our Windows desktop installer is set to expire in two weeks. We need to generate a new key pair on our hardware security module (HSM) and get it signed.
triage_reason_summary: Code signing certificates and HSM key operations are managed under IT003 security engineering.
triage_recommended_next_action: Generate a new key pair on the HSM, submit the CSR to the CA provider, sign the new release, and verify validity.

title: Active Directory group policy modification for desktop lock screen timeout
description: We need to update our security policy for the office laptops. The lock screen timeout should be reduced from 15 minutes to 5 minutes to prevent unauthorized access when users step away from their desks.
triage_reason_summary: Group policy objects (GPO) configuration and endpoint lockdown falls under IT003 security administration.
triage_recommended_next_action: Update the GPO configuration for screen lock timeout in Active Directory and verify propagation to test laptops.

title: Retrieving BitLocker recovery key for locked laptop after BIOS update
description: After a bios update, my Dell laptop booted into the BitLocker recovery screen, asking for a 48-digit recovery key. I do not have this key. I cannot access Windows.
triage_reason_summary: BitLocker key retrieval and decryption block remediation is handled by IT003 security keys.
triage_recommended_next_action: Look up the computer's active directory object ID in Active Directory Users and Computers, retrieve the BitLocker key, and dictate it.

title: Coordination support for annual ransomware response dry-run simulation
description: We are planning our annual crisis response exercise for October. We need security to coordinate the testing scenario, simulate a ransomware outbreak on our staging network, and test IT notification chains.
triage_reason_summary: Security drills, playbook exercises, and risk management is coordinated by IT003 security team.
triage_recommended_next_action: Draft the ransomware scenario timeline, prepare simulated communications, and coordinate roles with department leads.

title: User access review audit for Jira database compliance
description: For the upcoming SOC2 audit, we need to verify all active user accounts in Jira and ensure there are no orphaned accounts belonging to past contractors. Please provide the monthly access review sheet.
triage_reason_summary: User access audits, IAM reviews, and compliance documentation fall under IT003.
triage_recommended_next_action: Generate a list of active users in Jira, cross-reference with active employees in HRIS, and highlight differences.

title: Unlocking corporate Google Drive folder access for external auditor
description: Our external legal team needs access to a specific Google Drive folder containing regulatory documents. Since global sharing settings are restricted, we need security to whitelist their domain name.
triage_reason_summary: Google Workspace file-sharing settings and whitelisting is handled by IT003 Workspace admin.
triage_recommended_next_action: Add the external domain to the approved Google Workspace sharing list and authorize the folder share.

title: Offboarding request: Revoking corporate G Suite and Slack access
description: An employee is leaving the company at the end of the day. Please schedule the automatic suspension of their Google Workspace account, removal from corporate Slack, and deletion of their VPN profiles.
triage_reason_summary: Scheduled offboarding and access revocation belongs in the IT003 accounts workflow.
triage_recommended_next_action: Schedule the AD and Google Workspace account disabling commands to execute at 5 PM on the departure date.

title: Single Sign-On (SSO) integration request for new internal wiki platform
description: We are launching a new team documentation site and want to integrate it with Okta so employees can log in using their standard credentials. We need an OIDC application client ID and secret generated.
triage_reason_summary: Okta SSO integration and application configuration is routed to IT003 security identity.
triage_recommended_next_action: Configure a new application in Okta, define access claims, and share the OIDC credentials securely with the developers.

title: Phishing simulation campaign setup request for Q3 awareness training
description: We need to schedule the quarterly mock phishing campaign to test our employees' security awareness. Please set up the template using the fake Microsoft password reset email and configure the tracking metrics.
triage_reason_summary: Phishing simulation management and employee metrics belong to IT003 security GRC.
triage_recommended_next_action: Select the phishing template, upload the employee distribution list, and schedule the campaign execution.

title: Investigating suspicious login locations flagged by Okta risk engine
description: Okta triggered a high-risk security alert for an employee account showing a successful login from Warsaw, Poland, followed 10 minutes later by a login from Hanoi. This looks like a session hijacking attempt.
triage_reason_summary: Impossible travel alerts and session hijacking detection are high priority incident response tasks under IT003.
triage_recommended_next_action: Immediately terminate all active sessions for the flagged account, force password reset, and verify the traveler's location.

title: Requesting access log review for shared file containing server secrets
description: A text file containing database passwords was accidentally committed to a shared folder. We have removed the file, but we need security to check the server logs to see if anyone downloaded it.
triage_reason_summary: Sensitive data leak investigation and access log analysis falls under IT003 incident response.
triage_recommended_next_action: Inspect the file server access audit logs, list all user accounts that accessed the file, and recommend password rotations.

title: Third-party developer security assessment review request
description: We are outsourcing database work to an external agency. Before we share access to our API documentation, we need security to verify their developers have signed the NDA and completed our background check.
triage_reason_summary: External partner security assessments and GRC validation is handled by IT003 GRC.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check the signed NDA records, verify the background check status, and approve the partner onboarding status.

title: DKIM / SPF record mismatch causing corporate emails to bounce
description: Our marketing emails are bouncing from external client servers. The bounce-back messages report that our domain's SPF record is missing the new SendGrid mailing IP address, causing mail checks to fail.
triage_reason_summary: Email security protocols (DKIM/SPF) and DNS security modifications are managed by IT003.
triage_recommended_next_action: Update the TXT DNS record for corporate SPF to include SendGrid, and check DKIM selector validation.

title: Requesting user permission group change in Active Directory
description: I have been promoted to marketing manager, and I need access to the budget planning files in the finance AD share. Please update my AD group membership from marketing-staff to marketing-leads.
triage_reason_summary: AD group membership changes and RBAC updates fall under IT003 user accounts.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify manager approval, add the user account to the marketing-leads security group in Active Directory.

title: SSO certificate renewal deadline warning in Okta admin console
description: The certificate used for signing SAML requests between Okta and our billing portal is set to expire in 48 hours. If it expires, users will not be able to log in to the billing portal. We need a new certificate.
triage_reason_summary: SSO certificate lifecycle management is a critical identity access item handled by IT003.
triage_recommended_next_action: Generate a new SAML signing certificate in Okta, upload it to the billing portal SAML metadata settings, and test authentication.

title: DLP alert triggered by mass file download from accounting database
description: Our Data Loss Prevention tool detected a mass download of tax invoices (over 500 documents) from the accounting database by an analyst account. This activity is outside their normal access baseline.
triage_reason_summary: DLP alerts and data exfiltration investigation is a high priority task managed by IT003 cyber security.
triage_recommended_next_action: Temporarily suspend the analyst's login account, verify the business reason for the download, and check file transfers.
